# Support

## General Questions

For general questions, setup help, guide corrections, local radio discussion, or community support:

* Join the Hampden County Mesh Discord through the website: https://hampdencountymesh.org/join/
* Open a GitHub Discussion, if Discussions are enabled for this repository
* Open a GitHub Issue if the question is directly related to the website, documentation, or repository content

## Website or Documentation Problems

Please open an issue if you notice:

* Broken links
* Outdated guide information
* Typos or unclear wording
* Missing attribution
* Public information that should be generalized or removed
* Problems with the coverage map, data files, or site layout

## Bugs

Please use the Bug Report issue template when available.

Include enough detail for someone else to understand the problem, such as:

* The page or file involved
* What you expected to happen
* What actually happened
* Screenshots, if useful
* Browser or device details, if the issue appears layout-related

## Security or Privacy Issues

Please do not open a public issue for security reports, exposed credentials, private locations, private node details, or sensitive screenshots.

Follow the process described in `SECURITY.md`, or contact:

[security@hampdencountymesh.org](mailto:security@hampdencountymesh.org)

## Discord Support

For Discord-related questions, invite problems, moderation concerns, or server access issues, contact:

[discord@hampdencountymesh.org](mailto:discord@hampdencountymesh.org)

## General Contact

For general project contact:

[contact@hampdencountymesh.org](mailto:contact@hampdencountymesh.org)
